name_cn:
ONTHEGO Medium Bag #️⃣M45321
Exclusive global launch of authentic counter-style merchandise! This item features Italian custom craftsmanship, dynamic chip serial number, original factory fabric, and original factory light gold electroplated full steel hardware (color matches authentic)
For comparison, please compare with the authentic Italian version!
We ensure 100% restoration of authentic feel! Exclusive authentic original fabric, hardware, edge oil, stitching + authentic craftsmanship, official website latest full gift box!
35 x 27 x 14 cm
(Length x Height x Width)
Monogram and Monogram Reverse coated canvas
Monogram and Monogram Reverse coated canvas trim
Fabric lining
Metal hardware
Zippered interior pocket
Double interior pocket
2 long leather shoulder straps
Handles: Double handles
